title: SQL injection introduced in user lookup
instructions: Review this diff. Return only the JSON object requested by the system prompt.
diff:
diff --git a/app/users.py b/app/users.py
index 9d1..b42 100644
--- a/app/users.py
+++ b/app/users.py
@@ -8,8 +8,12 @@ def get_user(conn, user_id: int):
     return cur.fetchone()
 
 def find_users(conn, name_prefix: str):
-    cur = conn.execute("SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE name LIKE ?", (name_prefix + '%',))
+    # Support admin wildcards in the search box.
+    sql = f"SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE name LIKE '{name_prefix}%'"
+    cur = conn.execute(sql)
     return cur.fetchall()
